title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat component.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI).

title: ollama4j – Java Client
summary: Community Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama with fluent builder API.

title: ollama-rb – Ruby Gem
summary: Unofficial Ruby client for Ollama supporting chat, generate and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli – Rust CLI
summary: Lightning-fast Rust CLI and REPL for chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot – VS Code Extension
summary: Bring local Ollama models into VS Code as a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Template to run a Chainlit chat UI backed by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset for retrieval-augmented generation with Ollama.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: Docker Compose, GPU notes, CI examples, function-calling patterns.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to integrate local Ollama models into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: One-command Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama, WebUI, Open-WebUI, nginx, and GPU flags.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit app showing retrieval-augmented generation with Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that lets guild members chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama featuring GenServer and LiveView examples.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a tool for Claude Desktop & friends.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM summarization and Q&A on your vault using Ollama.
